patch.value: CLI ergonomics polish: concise init, help alias collapse, named priorities, package install hints, starter templates, delete dry-run

Coordinates the remaining pm-5k2w low-severity backlog into one PR. Two specialized sub-agents (help-output-ergonomics, cli-input-ergonomics) own disjoint file sets; coordinator owns shared files (CHANGELOG, docs, completion, contracts), the L10 default-safety Decision, integration, full test/coverage gate, and the manual temp dogfood. Strong theme: reduce agent-facing CLI token cost and remove naive-input footguns. Links pm-5k2w.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Scope locked; file ownership partitioned across two sub-agents + coordinator. Ready to execute.

patch.value: L1 done by help-output-subagent. pm init default output cut 193->60 lines via summarizeInitResult() (path/prefix/governance/telemetry/created_dirs_count/all warnings/next_steps); full tree behind --verbose (193 lines) and preserved for --json. Verified in temp dir + init-command.spec green.

L4 done by help-output-subagent. Pure snake_case underscore-duplicate aliases now hidden from commander --help via Option().hideHelp() (rule: hide iff alias long-flag == kebab flag with -/_ swapped; semantic aliases --fail-on-warn/--local/--active-only/--ac/--rank stay visible). New pure helper src/core/shared/option-alias-visibility.ts (100% covered, in vitest include). create --help 108->92 lines, 0 snake lines; verified --create_mode/--why_now still parse; --fail-on-warn still shown. help-runtime + option-alias-visibility specs green (52 tests).

L8 done by cli-input-subagent. Shared resolvePriority() in src/core/item/priority.ts (100% covered, in vitest include); maps critical/high/medium/low/minimal<->0..4 case-insensitive, numeric 0..4 unchanged, invalid throws USAGE listing both forms. create+update ensurePriority() delegate. Verified: high->1, Critical->0, 3->3, update minimal->4, bogus->helpful error. No accept/reject regression vs old (old already enforced 0..4).

L7 done by cli-input-subagent. error-guidance.ts unknown_command branch now resolves a KNOWN_PACKAGE_COMMAND_HINTS catalog (guide->@unbrained/pm-guide-shell via `pm install guide-shell`; templates->@unbrained/pm-templates; calendar+cal->@unbrained/pm-calendar) and weaves the install command + package name into title/happened/required/examples/next_steps. Existing guidance fields preserved; unknown non-package tokens unchanged. Verified: `pm guide` and `pm cal` (uninstalled) now print the package + install hint.

L9 done by cli-input-subagent. packages/pm-templates runtime.ts + hand-maintained runtime.js mirror now ship 4 builtin starter templates (bug=Issue, feature=Feature, spike=Task timeboxed, chore=Chore). runTemplatesList returns {templates,count,builtin_templates,user_templates}; runTemplatesShow returns source:builtin|user; user-saved templates override same-name builtins; builtins usable in create-from-template without saving. Verified after `pm install templates`: pm templates -> count:4; templates show bug -> source:builtin with useful scaffold.
